text:
proceeding tattvas.
Prithivi being ruled by Mercury can give male or female
births. The second half of Jala (6 minutes) and the second half
ofVayu (12 minutes) do give rise to male births. The second
half ofTejas (9 minutes) and Akash (15 minutes) can give rise
to female births. These factors have to be kept in mind while
using the tables.
Dr. B. Satyanarayan~ Rao gave some tables in his book.
He started with Krittika, and we with Asvini. He takes
Prithivi, Tejas, and Akash to give male births ohly, while the
other two give female births. We are inclined to take Prithivi
to "give male or female children, preferably female children.
The other four have to be divided each into two parts. The
second half of Jala tattva and Vayu Tattva can give male
births. Similarly the second half of Tejas and Akash Tattva
can give female births. These are the modifications proposed
in the following tables. The lagnas referred to are Nirayana
Signs.
The abbrevations use are :
P = Prithvi
J • J ala
